title: Start a project you've been putting off for months — do the first real step today
flavour: not 'think about it'. not 'research it more'. do the first concrete thing.

title: Sign up for a class that teaches a skill you've always wanted — first session this week
flavour: you've been saying you'd learn it. this is the part where you actually do.

title: Complete a substantial DIY project — paint a room, build a shelf, fix a bike
flavour: full project. start to finish. you are the contractor. execute.

title: Spend a full day on a creative project with nothing to show for it at start
flavour: blank canvas. full day. something will exist that didn't before.

title: Cook a three-course meal for someone else
flavour: starter, main, dessert. from scratch. someone will eat your output.

title: Learn enough of a language to have a basic 5-minute conversation
flavour: greetings. numbers. please and thank you. it's more than zero. start.

title: Declutter and donate a full bag of things from your home
flavour: the stuff you own, owns you. release one bag of captives.

title: Write and publish something — a blog post, a thread, a short essay
flavour: it doesn't have to go viral. it has to exist. publish it.

title: Build something small with code — a script, a webpage, a tool
flavour: you don't have to be a developer. you just have to make a thing that runs.

title: Spend the day mastering one specific skill you're mediocre at — intense, focused practice
flavour: deliberate practice. not casual dabbling. the difference is the intent.
